spacing_and_layout.general: Generous internal padding for containers (p-6, p-8) to avoid text collision with borders. Left-align dense content.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Widget span logic: Summary (col-span-1), Main Chart (col-span-2 or 3), Feed (col-span-1 row-span-2). Use full height stretch (h-full).
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) to emphasize the brutalist/technical construction environment.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Avoid soft/blurry shadows. Use 1px solid borders (border-border) or sharp solid offset shadows.

surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton using border-collapse style layouts with subtle borders on right and bottom. Flat white backgrounds.
surface_strategies.header: Solid background with a stark bottom border. fixed z-50. No glassmorphism.
surface_strategies.command_bar: Terminal Variant: Prominent, stark, 2px solid border with high-contrast focus state.

components.buttons: Flat, rectangular, solid colors. Active states must change background and text color (e.g., hover:bg-orange-700 hover:text-white). Focus: ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-orange-500.
components.tables: Shadcn-based, but dense spacing. text-sm. Explicit color changes on row hover.
components.ai_assistant: Side panel or bottom-right floating widget. Distinct background (e.g., #FAFAFA) with sharp borders. Messages have square corners.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit text color setting on hover. Subtle -translate-y-px on interactive cards.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Specific transitions like transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out. Do not use transition-all.
motion_and_interactions.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a kebab-case role-based data-testid attribute.

icons.usage: Use duotone or bold weights for robust visibility in industrial environments.

image_urls.description: Aerial view of an active construction site. Use as login background or header banner with heavy black/white overlay.
Indian construction workers in safety gear. Use in the Workforce Intelligence dashboard, profile placeholders, or SOP examples.
Minimalist logo placeholder for the company brand.

media.image_overlays: Max overlay opacity: bg-black/50 for dark theme aspects, bg-white/40 for light theme. Never completely obscure the image.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Control Room' grid layout for the Project Intelligence dashboards. Ensure all charts and widgets stretch to match neighbors.
Implement the 'Natural-language AI Command Bar' as a prominent sticky or fixed element, accessible from any page, using a technical/terminal aesthetic.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for all dashboard section headings and IBM Plex Sans for tables, data, and body.
Apply 'Grid Borders' surface strategy: avoid standard card components with soft shadows; instead, use flat containers separated by stark 1px borders.
Ensure the Multi-rate Payroll & Settlements ledger uses dense table layouts with clear typography (IBM Plex Sans) to ensure numbers align properly.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items, table rows) MUST have a data-testid attribute for automated testing.
Implement Shadcn UI heavily but strip the Vercel look by removing rounded corners and adding hard borders.
Write all React components as .js files, not .tsx. Avoid TypeScript typings in component definitions.
